align_qr: Align the QR code in the frame
enter_payment_id: Enter Payment ID or QR content
verify_identity: Verify the beneficiary identity before payment
signature_instruction: The beneficiary signs here with finger
signature_too_short: Signature too short, please sign again
invalid_qr: Invalid QR Code - Payment not found
not_cash_payment: This QR code is not a Cash payment
camera_not_supported: Camera is not supported in this browser. Please open in Chrome (Android) or Safari (iPhone).
camera_permission_denied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
camera_not_found: No camera detected on this device.
camera_in_use: Camera is in use by another app. Close other apps and try again.
camera_back_unavailable: Back camera not available. Trying front camera.
camera_https_required: Camera is blocked. The site must be opened over HTTPS.
not_cash_agent: This account is not authorized as a Cash Agent
